events.text: Revenue $2,505m, +0.7% q/q / ~+11% y/y. Gross margin 20.1%, +0.9pt q/q (above consensus). Net profit attributable $197m, +14% q/q but below consensus on lower government subsidies. Utilization 93.1%, -2.6pt q/q; shipments -0.2% q/q but blended ASP +2.5% q/q. Q2 2026 guide: revenue +14% to +16% q/q, GM 20-22%.

The +14-16% Q2 guide far exceeded the low bar from the Street/JPM (+2-7%); split ~shipments +10% / ASP +5%, with price hikes of 5-10% in BCD/analog/PMIC/storage. JPM upgraded from UW → Neutral, PT HK$57 → HK$67, but kept Neutral on 2H consumer risk.

cells: 'strong demand for chips from AI'; NOR/NAND tight
